rationale_top3: Nature & Surroundings (15/20): The park benefits from a reasonable natural setting in the Hervey Bay area Cleanliness (10/15): Maintains acceptable cleanliness standards across facilities Value for Money (10/15): Offers fair pricing for the amenities and location provided

water_fun: Limited water-based entertainment facilities on-site based on low entertainment score
kids_play: Basic children's play facilities available but not a major feature of the park
pet_detail: Below-average pet facilities and amenities (5/10) suggest limited pet infrastructure
best_for: Short stays, budget travelers, and those prioritizing location in Hervey Bay over extensive on-site amenities
